author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
pālya-dāsī kari’, lalitā sundarī,
āmāre loiyā kabe
śrī⋅rādhikā pade, kāle milāibe,
ājñā⋅sevā samarpibe

śrī⋅rūpamañjarī, saṅge jāba kabe,
rasa⋅sevā⋅śikṣā tare
tadanugā ha’ye, rādhā⋅kuṇḍa taṭe,
rahiba harṣitāntare

śrī-viśākhā-pade, saṅgīta śikhiba,
kṛṣṇalīlā rasamaya
śrī⋅rati⋅mañjarī, śrī⋅rasa mañjarī,
hoibe sabe sadaya

parama ānande, sakale miliyā,
rādhikā caraṇe raba
ei parākāṣṭa, siddhi kabe ha’be,
pā’ba rādhā⋅padāsava
en_translation:
When will beautiful Lalitā make me her maidservant, take me, and in time introduce me to the lotus feet of Śrī Rādhikā and entrust me with serving Her commands?

When will I go with Śrī Rūpa Mañjarī to learn the service of divine love? Becoming her follower, I will joyfully remain on the banks of Rādhā-kuṇḍa.

At the feet of Śrī Viśākhā, I will learn music, which is full of the divine pastimes of Kṛṣṇa. Śrī Rati Mañjarī and Śrī Rasa Mañjarī will all be merciful.

With supreme bliss, meeting with all of them, I will remain at the lotus feet of Rādhikā. When will this ultimate perfection be achieved, and I will attain the nectar of Rādhā's feet?
